race.comment: BLANTONS RUN (9) will find this easier than last start when she finished seventh over 1400m at Gold Coast, that effort following on from a minor placing two starts ago at this track. Can do much better in this more suitable race. FIGHTING IDOL (6) settled back but wound up late to finish fifth when resuming last start over 1000m at Sunshine Coast. Usually performs well with that run under his belt. Backmarker who keeps coming and is one of the leading chances. BEAU WITNESS (1) disappointed last time when fifth over 1300m here after a close third at this circuit the run prior. Goes well at this shorter journey so should be competitive. REVALENE (4) hit the frame two starts ago at this course but ran below par last time when tenth and beaten 5.5 lengths over 1000m at Sunshine Coast. Has his share of talent and can do a lot better.
